item.title: What To Watch This Weekend: New Shows And Movies To Stream On Netflix, Hulu, Prime Video, Apple TV And More
item.description: Looking for something new to stream this weekend? Here’s every major new movie and show hitting Netflix, Hulu, Prime Video, Apple TV and more.

item.title: 200 Judges Have Signed Up To Learn AI—The Other 31,500 Should Too
item.description: The Judicial AI Consortium is free, judges-only, and run by three sitting judges. About 200 have joined. The evidence landing in courtrooms says that ...

item.title: Billionaire Josh Kushner’s Firm Invests In San Francisco Giants—Its First Sports Bet
item.description: The deal marks the first investment from the firm’s new strategic focus on non-technology companies.

item.title: NYT Strands Hint Today: Saturday, April 25 Clues And Answers (On The Shopping Block)
item.description: Looking for some help with today's NYT Strands? An extra hint and the answers are right here to help you finish the grid and keep your streak intact.

item.title: AI Boosts Productivity — And Fears Of Layoffs, Anthropic Study Finds
item.description: With AI, people's concerns turn to economics. About 1 in 5 worry about job displacement — but cite greater productivity.
